name: estimate-chain-components
description: Estimate the evolution of every type:'component' node of a canonical value-chain WardleyMap. A selector engine (select-by-type:component) builds the array of component nodes — anchors and other types are excluded — and the recipe fans out the single-component positioner (llm-direct) over that array. Output is per-component evolution annotations: positioning here is a pointwise per-component analysis, NOT a bulk map transform, and produces no rendered map.
